summary: The current implementation satisfies the endpoint-domain-and-schema task in substance. Prisma/SQLite persistence is wired, migrations define endpoint/parameter/response-case tables with required fields, db:prepare applies migrations, generates the client, and runs idempotent seed defaults. The generated DB schema doc matches the implemented shape, and the provided mandatory gate results all passed.
satisfied_exit_criteria: npm run db:prepare is implemented via scripts/db-prepare.mjs and prepares SQLite state with Prisma migrations, client generation, and seed defaults.
db:prepare repeatability is covered by tests/unit/db-prepare.test.ts, which runs the command twice against an isolated SQLite database and verifies singular seed rows.
The Prisma schema represents endpoint names, descriptions, enabled state, ordered parameters, response cases, default responses, delete codes, timestamps, and failure config fields.
docs/generated/db-schema.md accurately documents the Endpoint, EndpointParam, ResponseCase models and seed defaults observed in prisma/schema.prisma and prisma/seed.mjs.
Mandatory checks were reported passing: npm run db:prepare, npm run test:unit, and npm run verify.
